primary_issue.title: 扩展 workflow-state:completed closeout 提示，覆盖 PR body、dry-run 与 metadata tail
primary_issue.reason: intake/handoff 主 issue，默认进入 close 候选。
acceptance_evidence: trellis/workflows/guru-team/workflow.md 与 .trellis/workflow.md 的 [workflow-state:completed] 已同步扩展，覆盖 gate stale fallback、PR body/readiness、dry-run、metadata tail 和 direct publish 禁止。
.codex/hooks/test_inject_workflow_state.py 增加 completed breadcrumb 回归测试，验证 hook parser 从 workflow Markdown 读取关键 closeout 文案。

验证通过：python3 .codex/hooks/test_inject_workflow_state.py、get_context phase/3.5/3.6、json.tool、bash -n、py_compile、task validate、dogfood overlay drift、git diff --check。current-branch throwaway install 受未推送 slash branch ref 限制未完成，已记录为 publish 后复验风险。

close_issues.title: 扩展 workflow-state:completed closeout 提示，覆盖 PR body、dry-run 与 metadata tail
close_issues.reason: 默认 close 候选；publish 前必须在 task artifact 中补齐验收证据。
acceptance_evidence: canonical workflow 和 dogfood active workflow 的 completed breadcrumb 已保持一致。
breadcrumb 明确 completed 是 fallback/legacy closeout breadcrumb，并说明正常路径是 Branch Review Gate 后显式 trellis-finish-work。
breadcrumb 明确缺失/失败/stale/reviewer-only gate 返回 Phase 3.5；gate 通过后使用 task-local PR body/readiness，先 dry-run 再正式 finish-work，禁止直接 publish-pr。
hook 回归测试覆盖 completed breadcrumb 关键内容。
